overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a video game depicting a grand medieval dining hall with gothic architecture, floating candle chandeliers, and long wooden tables filled with dining figures. The warm candlelight illuminates the stone interior and stained glass windows while the camera observes the scene from an elevated side gallery position.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand dining hall with house tables and floating candles

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the dining hall from an elevated side gallery position overlooking the long tables

notable_agents.action: figure in white robes walking along the far wall near the stained glass windows
standing figure near the stone archways on the opposite side of the hall

entered.detail: numerous floating candles suspended by magic forming chandelier clusters along the ceiling
tall arched stained glass windows with intricate designs along the left wall
long wooden house tables arranged in rows with dining ware and food
gothic stone archways and columns along the right wall of the hall
lit wall-mounted torches providing warm ambient lighting between the archways
high vaulted ceiling with stone ribbing disappearing into shadows above

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady elevated view of a magnificent gothic dining hall illuminated by hundreds of floating candles. Students sit at long oak tables eating and conversing, while the warm glow of candlelight reflects off the marble floors and stained glass windows. The atmosphere is calm and communal, with occasional figures moving in the background near the stone archways.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, elevated perspective of a magnificent gothic dining hall, capturing a scene of communal warmth and architectural grandeur. It begins with a wide view of the space, where hundreds of floating candles cast a golden glow over students gathered at long oak tables. As the camera holds its position, the warm light reflects across the polished marble floors and illuminates the intricate details of the stained glass windows. The scene remains serene, with the stillness of the gallery contrasting against the subtle movement of figures drifting near the distant stone archways.
